description_long: This helmet features a futuristic, armored design with a combination of matte gray and bronze metallic panels, giving it a robust and high-tech appearance. The surface is adorned with intricate mechanical detailing, including visible bolts, layered plating, and embedded components that suggest advanced functionality. On the left side, the word 'TEACHER' is inscribed, while the right side displays 'ANGRY', both etched into the surface, adding a personalized or thematic touch. The front of the helmet is streamlined with a central ridge and small, glowing blue elements that may represent sensors or lights. The rear is more solid and less detailed, emphasizing protection. The overall form is contoured to fit closely around the head, with no visible visor or external retention system.
description: A futuristic, armored helmet with gray and bronze panels, mechanical detailing, and etched text on the sides. The design is robust, high-tech, and closely contoured to the head.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central ridge, glowing blue elements, and symmetrical armored plating.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'TEACHER' inscription and detailed mechanical components.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid bronze panel with minimal detailing, emphasizing protection.
description_view_3: Right side view features the 'ANGRY' inscription and similar mechanical detailing as the left.
attribute_graphic_design: Etched text 'TEACHER' on the left and 'ANGRY' on the right, with a number '05' on the front; otherwise, solid color panels with mechanical detailing.
